light.stylesheet: QMainWindow { background-color: #e0e5ec; } QWidget { color: #333333; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } QDockWidget { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); border: 1px solid #d1d9e6; border-radius: 10px; } QDockWidget::title { background: transparent; padding: 10px; } QTextEdit, QPlainTextEdit { background-color: #f0f4f8; border: 2px solid #e0e5ec; border-radius: 8px; color: #2c3e50; font-family: 'Consolas', monospace; font-size: 14px; padding: 5px; } QTabBar::tab { background: #e0e5ec; border: 1px solid #d1d9e6; padding: 8px 15px; border-top-left-radius: 8px; border-top-right-radius: 8px; } QTabBar::tab:selected { background: #f0f4f8; border-bottom-color: #f0f4f8; } QPushButton { background-color: #e0e5ec; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #d1d9e6; } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: #d1d9e6; }

dark.stylesheet: QMainWindow { background-color: #1e1e1e; } QWidget { color: #d4d4d4; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } QDockWidget { background-color: #2d2d30; border: 1px solid #3f3f46; } QDockWidget::title { background: #2d2d30; padding: 8px; } QTextEdit, QPlainTextEdit { background-color: #252526; border: 1px solid #3f3f46; color: #d4d4d4; font-family: 'Consolas', monospace; font-size: 14px; } QTabBar::tab { background: #2d2d30; border: 1px solid #3f3f46; padding: 8px 15px; } QTabBar::tab:selected { background: #1e1e1e; border-bottom-color: #1e1e1e; } QPushButton { background-color: #3f3f46; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 16px; margin: 4px; } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: #007acc; }

gray.stylesheet: QMainWindow { background-color: #555555; } QWidget { color: #f0f0f0; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } QDockWidget { background-color: #666666; border: 1px solid #333333; } QTextEdit, QPlainTextEdit { background-color: #444444; border: 1px solid #333333; color: #f0f0f0; font-family: 'Consolas', monospace; font-size: 14px; } QTabBar::tab { background: #666666; border: 1px solid #333333; padding: 8px 15px; } QTabBar::tab:selected { background: #444444; } QPushButton { background-color: #777777; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 16px; margin: 4px; }
